issues.description: Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but card text specifies 'at the bottom of the owner's deck' — should be a different action type (likely custom 'PlaceAtBottomOfDeck' or similar deck placement action, not hand return)

Text says 'up to 1' (optional) but DSL structure doesn't reflect optionality; maxCost constraint is correct (2) but target scope should allow choosing 0 or 1
